miscTables.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,Ledger,Co,TP,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Ledger in ('UG','IF','LG') or (Ledger = 'US' and not Co like '200%' and not Co like '23%')) group by KeyID,Ledger,Co,TP

Insert into TransX (KeyID,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,TP,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Co like '200%' and not TP like '200%' group by KeyID,TP

Insert into TransX (KeyID,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,TP,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass3' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Co like '23%' and not TP like '23%' group by KeyID,TP

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Ledger = y.Ledger and x.Co = y.Co and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 >= 0 and x.GL like '28%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass1' and x.Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Ledger = y.Ledger and x.Co = y.Co and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 < 0 and x.GL like '19%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass1' and x.Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 >= 0 and x.GL like '28%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass2' and x.Flex1 is NULL and x.Ledger = 'US' and x.Co like '200%'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 < 0 and x.GL like '19%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass2' and x.Flex1 is NULL and x.Ledger = 'US' and x.Co like '200%'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 >= 0 and x.GL like '28%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass3' and x.Flex1 is NULL and x.Ledger = 'US' and x.Co like '23%'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select x.KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.TP,round(-x.Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.TP = y.TP where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.Amt1 < 0 and x.GL like '19%' and y.Flex1 = 'pass3' and x.Flex1 is NULL and x.Ledger = 'US' and x.Co like '23%'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '28%' and Flex1 is NULL and Ledger = 'US' and ((Co like '23%' and TP like '23%') or (Co like '200%' and TP like '200%'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 in ('pass1','pass2','pass3') or Flex1 is NULL or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set GL = '1999901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999900'
update TransX set GL = '2899901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2899900'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,Ledger,Co,(case when substring(GL,1,2) = '28' then '19' else '28' end) + substring(GL,3,5) as GL,TP,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'pass5' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass4'
update TransX set GL = '1999901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999902' and Flex1 = 'pass5'
update TransX set GL = '1999902' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999906' and Flex1 = 'pass5'
update TransX set GL = '2899906' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2899902' and Flex1 = 'pass5'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,Amt1,Flex1) select KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'pass6' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,TP
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('pass4','pass5')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set Txt = 'Reclass TP inter-co bal (Rec/Pay) for [Yr]-[Mo]', PC = '5500000000', Flex1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update x set x.TPname = y.Name from TransX x inner join TPs y on x.TP = y.TP where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
